article_title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Launches July 28 as the First Halo Game on PlayStation, an Unreal Engine 5 Remake of the 2001 Original
summary: Accurate, well-sourced News report on Halo: Campaign Evolved; every claim, quote and specific verified against snapshots. Sole warning is playstation.com off-allowlist, a reputable first-party store whose facts are independently corroborated — no correction warranted.

content_preview.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Launches July 28 as the First Halo Game on PlayStation, an Unreal Engine 5 Remake of the 2001 Original
content_preview.summary: Halo Studios' Unreal Engine 5 remake of Halo: Combat Evolved arrives July 28 on PS5, Xbox and PC, day one on Game Pass and marking the franchise's first appearance on PlayStation.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

*Halo: Campaign Evolved* will launch July 28, 2026, and according to [Xbox Wire](https://news.xbox.com/en-us/2026/06/07/halo-campaign-evolved-launch-preorder-xbox-games-showcase-2026/) it will be available on Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, cloud, Steam and PlayStation 5. That platform lineup makes it the first entry in the *Halo* franchise to reach a Sony console: as [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Halo:_Campaign_Evolved) notes, it is the first entry in the *Halo* franchise ...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News report using the house Overview / What We Know / What We Don't Know / Analysis format. 594 words, comfortably within the News 400-1200 range. Technical depth is appropriate for a game-launch story and the 'What We Don't Know' section responsibly flags open questions (per-platform resolution/frame-rate targets, cross-progression, post-launch content).
editor_notes.source_verification: All 5 source snapshots fetched with HTTP 200 and read from disk; each snapshot's uncompressed sha256 matches manifest.json. source-0.html.gz (Xbox Wire, launch/pre-order): CONFIRMS July 28 2026 launch, availability on Xbox Series X|S / Xbox on PC / cloud / Steam / PlayStation 5, day-one Game Pass Ultimate + PC Game Pass, July 23 early access for Premium/Collector's, pricing ($49.99 Standard / $69.99 Premium / $199.99 Collector's SRP), three editions, Operation: METEORITE three-mission arc, and 2-player split-screen (console only) + up to 4-player online co-op. source-1.html.gz (Wikipedia): CONFIRMS first Halo entry available on Sony's PlayStation consoles, remake of the story component of Halo: Combat Evolved (2001) originally developed by Bungie, developed by Halo Studios and published by Xbox Game Studios, built in Unreal Engine 5, Operation METEORITE led by Master Chief and UNSC Sgt. Avery Johnson, no original competitive multiplayer but four-player online co-op plus two-player split-screen. source-2.html.gz (Engadget): CONFIRMS '4K remake of the narrative component' of the original, 2001 debut, PS5/Xbox/PC on July 28, visual upgrades plus weapons/mechanics from subsequent Halo games, new locations, enemy variants and classic series weapons. source-3.html.gz (Xbox Wire, 'answering the big questions'): CONFIRMS the pivot to Unreal Engine 5, that new UE5 content is 'layered on top of code and systems carried directly over from the original games,' and that legacy code is 'instrumental in maintaining that authentic "Halo feel" within gameplay' — the article's quoted fragment 'Halo feel' appears verbatim. source-4.html.gz (PlayStation Store): CONFIRMS PS5 / PS5 Pro Enhanced listing and $49.99 and $69.99 prices.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every claim, number, name, date and direct-quote fragment traces to a cited snapshot. Headline, summary and Overview lead (July 28 launch; first Halo on PlayStation; UE5 remake of the 2001 original) are each backed by cited sources (Xbox Wire, Wikipedia, Engadget). No hallucinated quotes, no misattribution, no fabricated specifics detected. Every body URL is present in article.sources — no bidirectional gap.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. The Analysis section frames the PlayStation launch as part of Microsoft's multiplatform strategy in measured terms without sensationalism or editorializing. No AI self-reference.
editor_notes.originality: New topic. No prior Machine Herald coverage of Halo: Campaign Evolved (grep of src/content/articles found no match on 'campaign evolved' / 'halo studios'). Unrelated to the February Phil Spencer Xbox story and recent Sony/PlayStation gaming items.
concerns: playstation.com is not on config/source_allowlist.txt (automated warning). Judged editorially acceptable: it is the official first-party PlayStation storefront, a reputable primary source, and the specifics it supports (PS5 Pro support, $49.99/$69.99 pricing) are independently corroborated by the on-allowlist Xbox Wire source. No factual error to correct, so no corrections record is filed and the verdict is APPROVE rather than APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS. The allowlist was not modified.
recommendations: Optionally add playstation.com to the trusted source allowlist in a future maintenance pass; not required for this article.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: High-quality, accurate and fully verifiable News submission. All integrity checks pass, signature valid, all five sources personally read from snapshot and confirmed. Approved for publication as-is.
